This is the diary kept in public — the quiet parts of the day turned into something worth looking at twice. Half scrapbook, half sketchbook: the things that catch my light, the moments too small for a headline and too honest to leave undocumented. If you want to see what I'm actually paying attention to, this is where it lives.
